name: skillforge
description: SkillForge — AI Skills Registry for GitHub Copilot instruction files

scripts.setup: npm install && cd packages/web-portal && npm install && cd ../vscode-extension && npm install && npm run compile && cd ../..
scripts.setup:extension: cd packages/vscode-extension && npm install && npm run compile
scripts.build:extension: cd packages/vscode-extension && npm run compile && npx @vscode/vsce package --no-dependencies --allow-missing-repository --skip-license
